case_patterns.name: Symbolic Critique
case_patterns.rule: critique occurred but reopening did not occur

case_patterns.name: One-Time Exception
case_patterns.rule: one-time exception is not persistent reopening

case_patterns.name: Reopened Appeal Path
case_patterns.rule: appeal path restored and future exceptions can re-enter

case_patterns.name: Public Petition without Reopening
case_patterns.classification: possible symbolic rupture rather than confirmed operational reopening
case_patterns.rule: petitioned exception entered visibility but did not complete T_r, C_a, R_o, P_r
